revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:2 nguŏk 2 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:2月2日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 2월 2일]][[wuu:二月初二]][[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:二月初二]][[zh:二月初二]]
{{Not to be confused with|February 2|qq=February 2}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=二月初二|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 2월 2일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar February|qq=}} '''February 2''' is the 2nd day of the month {{ill|February (Lunisolar)|ja|2月 (旧暦)|lt=February (Kisaragi)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/February (Lunisolar)|qq=}}, the 2nd month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Senbu|qid=Q96759842|1=senpu}}{{efn|ja|先負|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Senbu|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q9418169}}. == Events == * {{ill|Public security|en|Public security|qid=Q294240|lt=Chian (era)|1=Public security}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1021|en|1021|qid=Q19257|lt=1021|1=1021}} {{ill|March 17|en|March 17|qid=Q2419|lt=March 17|1=March 17}}) – The era name was changed from {{ill|Kannin|en|Kannin|qid=Q1193951|lt=Kannin|1=Kannin}} to {{ill|Public security|en|Public security|qid=Q294240|lt=Chian|1=Public security}}. {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Eiroku|en|Eiroku|qid=Q1143341|lt=Eiroku|1=Eiroku}} 2nd year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1559|en|1559|qid=Q6609|lt=1559|1=1559}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|Oda Nobunaga|qid=Q171411|lt=Oda Nobunaga|1=Oda Nobunaga}} entered the capital and met with the Shōgun and {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|en|Ashikaga Yoshiteru|qid=Q447066|lt=Ashikaga Yoritomo|1=Ashikaga Yoshiteru}}. {{Citation needed|date=2021-02|qq=}} * {{ill|Kanbun (era)|en|Kanbun (era)|qid=Q1146228|lt=Kanbun|1=Kanbun (era)}} 12nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1672|en|1672|qid=Q7614|lt=1672|1=1672}} {{ill|March 1|en|March 1|qid=Q2393|lt=March 1|1=March 1}}) – At Joruri-zaka in Ichigaya, {{ill|Utsunomiya Domain|en|Utsunomiya Domain|qid=Q11449814|lt=Utsunomiya-han|1=Utsunomiya Domain}}'s Okudaira Genpachi avenged his father's death. This is counted as one of Japan's three great vendetta cases. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1851|en|1851|qid=Q7656|lt=1851|1=1851}} {{ill|March 4|en|March 4|qid=Q2396|lt=March 4|1=March 4}}) – {{ill|Shimazu Nariakira|en|Shimazu Nariakira|qid=Q1143856|lt=Shimazu Nariakira|1=Shimazu Nariakira}} assumed the headship of the {{ill|Satsuma Domain|en|Satsuma Domain|qid=Q676187|lt=Satsuma Domain|1=Satsuma Domain}}. * {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1872|en|1872|qid=Q7753|lt=1872|1=1872}} {{ill|March 10|en|March 10|qid=Q2397|lt=March 10|1=March 10}}) – The {{ill|Japan Christian Association|ja|日本基督公会|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japan Christian Association|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 横浜海岸教会|1=The Church of Christ in Japan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11507771}} was established in the Yokohama settlement, marking the first Protestant church established by Japanese nationals. == Births == * {{ill|Kōan (Kamakura period)|en|Kōan (Kamakura period)|qid=Q389180|lt=Kōan (Kamakura period)|1=Kōan (Kamakura period)}} 8th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1285|en|1285|qid=Q5546|lt=1285|1=1285}} {{ill|March 9|en|March 9|qid=Q2401|lt=March 9|1=March 9}}) – {{ill|Emperor Go-Nijō|en|Emperor Go-Nijō|qid=Q374075|lt=Go-Nijō Tennō|1=Emperor Go-Nijō}}, the 94th {{ill|Emperor of Japan|en|Emperor of Japan|qid=Q208233|lt=Emperor of Japan|1=Emperor of Japan}} (died {{ill|1308|en|1308|qid=Q5723|lt=1308|1=1308}}). * {{ill|Enkyō (Edo period)|en|Enkyō (Edo period)|qid=Q1183728|lt=Enkyō|1=Enkyō (Edo period)}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1748|en|1748|qid=Q7600|lt=1748|1=1748}} {{ill|February 29|en|February 29|qid=Q2364|lt=February 29|1=February 29}}) – {{ill|Sugawara Chayama|ja|菅茶山|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sugawara Chayama|1=Sazan Kan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1723424}}, a Confucian scholar and Chinese poet ({{ill|Ru|ja|儒学者|zh|儒生|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ru|1=Ru (Confucian scholar)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q125199930}}) (died {{ill|1827|en|1827|qid=Q7008|lt=1827|1=1827}}). * 明治4th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|qid=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|April 10|en|April 10|qid=Q2502|lt=April 10|1=April 10}}) – {{ill|Yokoyama Gennosuke|ja|横山源之助|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yokoyama Gennosuke|1=Yokoyama Gennosuke|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11542595}}, a journalist (died {{ill|1915|en|1915|qid=Q2084|lt=1915|1=1915}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Tenpyō-shōhō|en|Tenpyō-shōhō|qid=Q1373169|lt=Tenpyō Shōhō|1=Tenpyō-shōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|749|en|749|qid=Q23624|lt=749|1=749}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}}) – {{ill|Gyōki|en|Gyōki|qid=Q1136664|lt=Gyōki|1=Gyōki}}, a prominent Buddhist monk (born {{ill|668|en|668|qid=Q30116|lt=668|1=668}}). * {{ill|Jōhō|en|Jōhō|qid=Q1193592|lt=Shōho|1=Jōhō}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1074|en|1074|qid=Q19438|lt=1074|1=1074}} {{ill|February 2|en|February 2|qid=Q2313|lt=February 2|1=February 2}}) – {{ill|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|en|Fujiwara no Yorimichi|qid=Q1370620|lt=Fujiwara Yoritomo|1=Fujiwara no Yorimichi}}, a courtier and regent ({{ill|Kanpaku|ja|関白|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanpaku|1=kampaku|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1199966}}) for the later emperors 【後一条天皇】, 【後朱雀天皇】, and 【後冷泉天皇】 (born {{ill|992|en|992|qid=Q23724|lt=992|1=992}}). * {{ill|Kyōwa|en|Kyōwa|qid=Q960763|lt=Kyōwa|1=Kyōwa}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1802|en|1802|qid=Q6883|lt=1802|1=1802}} {{ill|March 5|en|March 5|qid=Q2392|lt=March 5|1=March 5}}) – {{ill|Ichinokami Asayemon|ja|市野上浅右エ門|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ichinokami Asayemon|1=Ichinojō Asaemon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11480733}}, a sumo wrestler (born {{ill|1767|en|1767|qid=Q7672|lt=1767|1=1767}}). == Commemorations == * {{ill|Futsuka Kyū|ja|二日灸|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Futsuka Kyū|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} / Kisaragi Kyū ** It is believed that applying moxibustion on this day doubles its effectiveness, ensuring a year of good health and safety.
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|2|1|2|3|1|2|3|2|0202|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 2월 2일]] [[ja:2月2日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:二月初二]]
[[ar:February 2 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[wuu:二月初二]] [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初二]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[wuu:二月初二]] [[zh-min-nan:2 goe̍h 2 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:二月初二]] {{wikidata link|Q839197}} [[Category:Days 2 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar February]] [[Category:Senbu]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
